response.justification: Exceeds experience requirements with 10+ years of demonstrated full-stack expertise directly aligned to the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS). Current and recent roles show mastery of backend and frontend development with explicit AI-agent infrastructure experience, a stated required skill. Minor gaps in Nest.js and Vitest are easily mitigated by deep foundational expertise in Node.js ecosystems and testing culture.
strengths: Direct expertise in primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS—currently building AI-agent infrastructure
Demonstrated full-stack capability and architectural maturity across 10+ years, including Staff-level roles and multiple complex systems
Strong testing and TDD culture with multiple contributions to testing frameworks and infrastructure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite deep Node.js background
Vitest and Playwright not explicitly mentioned; testing stack inferred from TDD background rather than named frameworks
PostgreSQL/relational database work not highlighted; MongoDB and SQL listed but no recent relational DB focus evident

key_factors.factor: Direct stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS)
